title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at S.Chand Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at S.Chand Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About S.Chand Group:
S.Chand Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
